## Release

### Checklist

- [ ] Update Changelog
- [ ] Test with SDK-API-Tester
- [ ] Version in helm-chart increased
- [ ] Version in cargo-file increased
- [ ] Version of api-docu increased
- [ ] Create Docker-Images
- [ ] Create Release-Tag
